name: Hidden Animals Find : Detective Neko
short_description: Neko and Watson follow various clues to solve the mystery. As they explore the many corners of the city, encountering hidden animals and formidable rivals, what awaits them at the end of the case?
detailed_description:
Hidden Animals Find: Detective Neko is a relaxing hidden-object game featuring beautiful, cozy visuals. Join Detective Neko and Watson as they search for animals across various maps and solve mysterious cases.

Neko and Watson follow countless clues to uncover the truth behind each case. As they search for animals and familiar rivals hidden throughout different parts of the city, what awaits them at the end of their investigation?

Neko is a brilliant detective from a long line of legendary investigators—though he often causes a bit of trouble along the way. Thankfully, his capable friend and all-around assistant Watson is always there to help. They prefer peaceful days, but before long, a call asking for their help arrives.

Where will this case lead them?

[ Cat's Story ]

A story set in a city where cats live!

  • 21 investigation episodes with Neko and Watson

  • 20 stages

  • A huge number of cats to find!

[ Dog's Story ]

A story set in a city where dogs live!

  • 13 investigation episodes with Neko and Watson

  • 12 stages

  • A huge number of dogs to find!

[ Challenge ]

Take on stages with near-impossible difficulty!

  • 7 Challenge stages

[ Reset Feature ]

  • When you reset a stage, the objects you need to find will change, allowing you to enjoy the same stage endlessly.

  • The Reset button appears at the bottom of the image for stages you have cleared.

[ Stage Ranking ]

  • Clear stages faster than anyone else and without mistakes to achieve a high ranking!

  • Your record is automatically registered in the stage ranking after clearing a stage.

  • Didn’t reach the rank you wanted? Don’t worry! Use the Reset Feature to reset the stage and challenge the ranking again.

  • The Ranking button appears at the top of the image for stages you have cleared.

[ Bug Reports / Inquiries / Partnerships ]

  • teamwolvesgame@gmail.com
